summary: QCOM's automotive and Snapdragon traction support its portfolio, but handset weakness, China risks and margin pressure cloud the stock outlook.

headline: The Toughest Questions MU Faced On Its Latest Call
summary: Micron just unveiled a new business model that promises to end its historic boom-and-bust cycles, but analysts on its latest call kept testing one critical question it leaves open.

headline: Why David Kuo is betting on ‘boring’ stocks as tech rally cools
summary: The Smart Investor co-founder David Kuo discusses the recent pullback of tech and chip stocks and whether markets will return to pre-Iran war levels.

headline: Why Qualcomm (QCOM) Shares Are Trading Lower Today
summary: Shares of wireless chipmaker Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) fell 4.5% in the afternoon session after Elon Musk denied reports that SpaceX was developing an AI device using the company's Snapdragon chip, and after its removal from several Russell indexes.
